mapper.sql: id, name, description, enabled, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at, version
mapper.select: SELECT FROM blog_tag WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM blog_tag WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM blog_tag WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
AND enabled = #{enabled}
SELECT COALESCE(MAX(id), 0) + 1 FROM blog_tag WHERE id < 10000000000
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO blog_tag
id, name, description, enabled, created_at, updated_at,
#{id}, #{name}, #{description}, #{enabled}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt},
mapper.update: UPDATE blog_tag SET name = #{name}, description = #{description}, enabled = #{enabled}, updated_at = #{updatedAt}, version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT FROM blog_tag WHERE deleted_at IS NULL AND enabled = 1 ORDER BY use_count DESC, id ASC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO blog_tag (id, name, description, enabled, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{name}, #{description}, #{enabled}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE name = #{name}, description = #{description}, enabled = #{enabled}, updated_at = #{updatedAt}
